ars-full.template:
Trigger the academic-pipeline orchestrator. Execute the complete academic research workflow: deep-research → academic-paper → integrity verification → academic-paper-reviewer → revision → re-review → final integrity → finalize. Load the academic-pipeline skill and follow its full pipeline orchestration.

Mode reference: MODE_REGISTRY.md § academic-pipeline.
Skill entry: academic-pipeline/SKILL.md.
ars-full.description: ARS full pipeline — research → write → review → revise → finalize

ars-plan.template:
Trigger the academic-paper skill in plan mode. Produce a Chapter Plan + INSIGHT collection through Socratic dialogue with the user. Originality-spectrum, very-high oversight.

Mode reference: MODE_REGISTRY.md § academic-paper.
Skill entry: academic-paper/SKILL.md.
ars-plan.description: ARS academic-paper plan mode — Socratic chapter-by-chapter planning

ars-outline.template:
Trigger the academic-paper skill in outline-only mode. Produce a detailed paper outline with evidence map, no full draft. Balanced spectrum, high oversight.

Mode reference: MODE_REGISTRY.md § academic-paper.
Skill entry: academic-paper/SKILL.md.
ars-outline.description: ARS academic-paper outline-only mode — detailed outline + evidence map

ars-revision.template:
Trigger the academic-paper skill in revision mode. Produce a revised draft plus point-by-point response-to-reviewers. Fidelity spectrum, high oversight.

Mode reference: MODE_REGISTRY.md § academic-paper.
Skill entry: academic-paper/SKILL.md.
ars-revision.description: ARS academic-paper revision mode — revised draft + R&R responses

ars-revision-coach.template:
Trigger the academic-paper skill in revision-coach mode. Parse reviewer comments and produce a Revision Roadmap plus a Response Letter skeleton, without writing the revision itself. Balanced spectrum, medium oversight.

Mode reference: MODE_REGISTRY.md § academic-paper.
Skill entry: academic-paper/SKILL.md.
ars-revision-coach.description: ARS academic-paper revision-coach mode — Revision Roadmap + Response Letter Skeleton

ars-abstract.template:
Trigger the academic-paper skill in abstract-only mode. Produce a bilingual (zh-TW + EN) abstract plus keywords. Fidelity spectrum, medium oversight.

Mode reference: MODE_REGISTRY.md § academic-paper.
Skill entry: academic-paper/SKILL.md.
ars-abstract.description: ARS academic-paper abstract-only mode — bilingual abstract + keywords

ars-lit-review.template:
Trigger the academic-paper skill in lit-review mode. Produce an annotated bibliography rendered as a literature review section. Fidelity spectrum, medium oversight.

Mode reference: MODE_REGISTRY.md § academic-paper.
Skill entry: academic-paper/SKILL.md.
ars-lit-review.description: ARS academic-paper lit-review mode — annotated bibliography in paper format

ars-format-convert.template:
Trigger the academic-paper skill in format-convert mode. Convert a paper between LaTeX, DOCX (via Pandoc), PDF, or Markdown, and convert citation styles between major formats. Fidelity spectrum, low oversight.

Mode reference: MODE_REGISTRY.md § academic-paper.
Skill entry: academic-paper/SKILL.md.
ars-format-convert.description: ARS academic-paper format-convert mode — convert to LaTeX / DOCX / PDF / Markdown

ars-citation-check.template:
Trigger the academic-paper skill in citation-check mode. Produce a citation error report (missing references, mismatched in-text citations, format errors). Fidelity spectrum, low oversight.

Mode reference: MODE_REGISTRY.md § academic-paper.
Skill entry: academic-paper/SKILL.md.
ars-citation-check.description: ARS academic-paper citation-check mode — citation error report

ars-disclosure.template:
Trigger the academic-paper skill in disclosure mode. Produce a venue-specific AI-usage disclosure statement (ICLR / NeurIPS / Nature / Science / ACL / EMNLP supported). Fidelity spectrum, low oversight.

Mode reference: MODE_REGISTRY.md § academic-paper.
Skill entry: academic-paper/SKILL.md.
ars-disclosure.description: ARS academic-paper disclosure mode — venue-specific AI-usage statement

ars-researcher.description: Deep research agent team. 13-agent pipeline for rigorous academic research. 7 modes: full, quick, socratic, review, lit-review, fact-check, systematic-review.

ars-writer.description: Academic paper writing agent team. 12-agent pipeline for paper writing. 10 modes: full, plan, outline-only, revision, revision-coach, abstract-only, lit-review, format-convert, citation-check, disclosure.

ars-reviewer.description: Multi-perspective academic paper reviewer. 7-agent team with EIC + 3 reviewers + Devil's Advocate. 6 modes: full, re-review, quick, methodology-focus, guided, calibration.

ars-pipeline.description: Full academic research pipeline orchestrator. 10-stage workflow: research → write → integrity → review → revise → re-review → final integrity → finalize.
